summary: Iteration 201: Tested inbox-metrics feature - all 11 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. GET /api/dashboard/inbox-metrics returns 200 with all 5 metric categories (total_inbox, by_status, by_type, by_age, by_vendor, by_blocker). Frontend renders Details toggle button in stats strip, clicking toggles inbox-metrics-panel visibility, panel shows 5 columns (By Status, By Type, By Age, Top Vendors, Blockers). Regression check: GET /api/dashboard/inbox-stats still works.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.py lines 981-1114: GET /api/dashboard/inbox-metrics correctly filters for non-terminal, non-cleared docs using TERMINAL_STATUSES and DONE_WF lists, aggregates by workflow_status, doc_type, age buckets (lt_1h, 1h_24h, 24h_3d, gt_3d), top 10 vendors, and blocker reasons (no_vendor, no_po, low_confidence, duplicate_flag, no_extraction, validation_failed)
UnifiedQueuePage.js lines 104-126: metrics state and metricsOpen state correctly initialized, fetchMetrics called on mount and every 60s interval
UnifiedQueuePage.js lines 423-431: Details toggle button with data-testid='toggle-inbox-metrics' correctly toggles metricsOpen state

UnifiedQueuePage.js lines 436-515: inbox-metrics-panel renders 5 columns with correct data-testid attributes (metrics-by-status, metrics-by-type, metrics-by-age, metrics-by-vendor, metrics-by-blocker)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has 0 docs in inbox (all completed/terminal)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 201 verified inbox-metrics feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/dashboard/inbox-metrics returns {total_inbox, by_status, by_type, by_age, by_vendor, by_blocker} - all fields present and correctly typed. (2) by_age has keys: lt_1h, 1h_24h, 24h_3d, gt_3d (all integers). (3) by_vendor is array of {vendor, count} objects (top 10). (4) by_blocker has keys: no_vendor, no_po, low_confidence, duplicate_flag, no_extraction, validation_failed (all integers). (5) Frontend Details button toggles metrics panel visibility. (6) Metrics panel shows 5 columns with correct data-testid attributes. (7) Preview environment has 0 docs in inbox so all metrics return zeroes/empty, but structure is correct. (8) GET /api/dashboard/inbox-stats regression check passed.

backend_api_tests: Response has by_age with lt_1h, 1h_24h, 24h_3d, gt_3d keys - PASS
Response has by_blocker with no_vendor, no_po, low_confidence, duplicate_flag, no_extraction, validation_failed keys - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Clicking Details opens metrics panel - PASS
Clicking Details again closes panel - PASS
